# incident-comms (fixture)

Incident Comms Partner — a cabinet agent fixture for Milestone 2 (prove the
format generalizes beyond a security domain). A read-only `partner` that
drafts incident status updates and stakeholder comms for a human to send;
never sends itself. Non-GitHub tools (slack / pagerduty).

Compile it with:

```bash
armature-cabinet build tests/fixtures/incident-comms
```
